confidence.explanation: All 9 primary ACs pass (confirmed independently on second run). UV suite: UV-1 PASS (Cognito favicon 404 is third-party/allowlisted), UV-2 PASS (all 10 API calls 200), UV-3 PASS (0 broken images), UV-4 exempt (read-only docs). UV-5 needs-review (axe-core unavailable in Playwright MCP), UV-6 needs-review (run-001 is now baseline candidate). Open issues: (1) MRDT 2% in API/UI vs 3% in spec вҖ” confirmed property-configured, consistent across both runs. (2) invoice.currency empty string in API. (3) total_deposits summary field = 0 in API (deposits held as line items only).

test_cases.title: Folio renders via Reservation Detail вҶ’ Print Folio
test_cases.note: Print Folio button opens Folio Preview dialog. Full header, guest info, line items, totals, T&Cs, signature all rendered. Consistent with run-001.

test_cases.title: Folio line item rows are populated (not empty)
test_cases.note: Row '326 Room | 07/15/2026 | 07/17/2026 | 1 | $119.00 | $119.00' visible. Known defect FIXED (confirmed second run).

test_cases.title: Invoice renders via Reservation Detail вҶ’ Print Invoice
test_cases.note: Invoice Preview dialog renders with Invoice Number TOTEWCLQEH, all sections present. Consistent with run-001.

test_cases.title: Invoice Hotel Room charge is a dollar amount, not a ticket ID
test_cases.note: Room charge shows $119.00 (not INV-506.00). Known defect FIXED (confirmed second run).

test_cases.title: Print Folio button invokes window.print()
test_cases.note: window.__printCalled=true confirmed via JS evaluation after clicking Print in folio dialog.

test_cases.title: Print Invoice button invokes window.print()
test_cases.note: window.__printCalled=true confirmed via JS evaluation after clicking Print in invoice dialog.

test_cases.title: API: GET /so/folio returns valid payload with line items
test_cases.note: HTTP 200. Keys: [invoice, terms, customer, location, booking]. 3 line items. subtotal=11900, total=13685, total_due=12685. MRDT 2% (vs spec 3%) вҖ” property-configured. currency=''.

test_cases.title: API: GET /so/invoice returns valid payload with reconciling totals
test_cases.note: HTTP 200. 11900+1785=13685 вң“; 13685-1000=12685 вң“. total_deposits summary field=0 (deposits as line items). currency=''.

test_cases.title: Console error scan
test_cases.note: 1 console error: Cognito favicon 404 (third-party/allowlisted). Zero first-party errors.

test_cases.title: Network error scan
test_cases.note: All 10 API calls to xin-api-np.wbee.ca returned 200. Zero 4xx/5xx.

test_cases.title: Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: Exempt: folio/invoice are read-only display documents with no save/publish flow.

test_cases.title: Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: axe-core not available via Playwright MCP. No a11y scan run. Downgraded to needs-review.

test_cases.title: Snapshot drift check
test_cases.note: run-qa-feature-ankit-001 is now a baseline candidate. Visual drift check between run-001 and run-002 screenshots deferred to manual review. Downgraded to needs-review.

issues_flagged.description: MRDT rate is 2% in API/UI across both runs. Product spec documents MRDT as 3%. Consistent вҖ” property-configured for Totem Lodge.
invoice.currency returns empty string in API (both folio and invoice endpoints). Expected 'CAD'.
invoice.total_deposits summary field = 0 in /so/invoice API. Deposits are present as individual line items (2Г—$5.00). UI correctly renders $10.00 deposits and $126.85 balance.
